trigger: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'metadata')
summary: catalog-service crashed on /api/catalog/entities after the SDK captured TypeError. Splunk context shows 12 matching errors.
rootCause: The catalog processor received an entity without a complete metadata block during provider refresh, so validation crashed before the entity could be rejected safely.

reasons: Current error volume is more than three standard deviations above baseline.
Failure affects a critical developer portal workflow.

evidence.message: SDK captured TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'metadata')

Repeated TypeError in entity validation pipeline after provider refresh

timeline.detail: Correlated failures exceeded automated alert threshold

proposedFix.explanation: Add a defensive metadata guard in the catalog entity processor and route invalid entities to a rejected-entity queue with enough context for the owning team.
steps: Guard catalog entity metadata before processor access.
Record rejected entity refs with provider and location metadata.
Replay the affected provider refresh after deploying the guard.

trigger: AuthenticationError: GitHub OAuth token exchange failed: invalid_client_id
summary: auth-resolver crashed on /api/auth/github/handler/frame after the SDK captured AuthenticationError. Splunk context shows 10 matching errors.
rootCause: The GitHub auth provider rejected OAuth token exchange because the configured client id did not match the active callback flow.

reasons: Current error volume is more than three standard deviations above baseline.
Failure affects a critical developer portal workflow.

evidence.message: SDK captured AuthenticationError: GitHub OAuth token exchange failed: invalid_client_id
GitHub OAuth token exchange failed: invalid_client_id
Auth provider github failed for 23 users in last 5 minutes

timeline.title: auth
timeline.detail: User initiated GitHub OAuth sign-in flow

timeline.title: splunk
timeline.detail: First matching auth-resolver error detected in Splunk

timeline.title: splunk
timeline.detail: Correlated failures exceeded automated alert threshold

proposedFix.explanation: Validate provider credentials at startup and block deploys when GitHub OAuth configuration is missing or mismatched.
steps: Validate GitHub auth provider credentials during backend startup.
Rotate or correct the OAuth client id and secret in deployment config.
Add an auth smoke test for the production callback route.
